note: Recorded result of the public baseline retriever (fixed-size 512/64 chunks, all-MiniLM-L6-v2 cosine top-10, no rerank) run through the paper's evaluation protocol on the released 20-question set. This is a fully public baseline, NOT the paper's proprietary structure-aware pipeline (which is not included). Regenerate with the harness scripts; the paper's own RUN-012/RUN-009 numbers are reproduced here for reference only.

public_baseline.retriever: all-MiniLM-L6-v2, fixed-size 512-token chunks / 64 overlap, cosine top-10, no rerank
